hero.description: TíaJo Bank transforms the school experience into a gamified environment with coins, goals, roles, rewards, and active participation.

motivation.title: Real Motivation
motivation.description: Students progress through goals, rewards, and visible achievements.

progress.title: Measurable Progress
progress.description: Track growth in responsibility, participation, and positive habits.

coexistence.title: Positive School Climate
coexistence.description: Reinforces positive actions, collaboration, and self-regulation in the classroom.

participation.title: Participation
participation.description: Brings together students, teachers, families, and support teams.

earn.title: Earn coins
earn.description: Students receive coins for responsibility, effort, and participation.

save.title: Save and decide
save.description: They learn to manage their symbolic resources and make decisions.

redeem.title: Redeem rewards
redeem.description: They access benefits, challenges, prizes, and experiences within the class.

celebrate.title: Celebrate achievements
celebrate.description: Progress becomes visible and reinforces academic self-esteem.

features.management: Management of students, courses, and coins.
features.roles: Roles and permissions by user type.

students.title: Students
students.description: Participate, meet goals, and visualize their progress.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.description: Manage incentives, courses, and classroom dynamics.

guardians.title: Parents
guardians.description: Accompany the process and recognize achievements.

testimonial.quote: When learning makes sense, students become more engaged.
testimonial.author: TíaJo Bank

right.title: Want to try TíaJo Bank?
right.description: Request a demo and discover how it can adapt to your school.
